definition: to leave a place or person
example: They had to abandon the car in the flood.

definition: to succeed in doing something difficult
example: She accomplished her dream of studying abroad.

definition: to change your behaviour to suit a new situation
example: It takes time to adapt to a new culture.

definition: to work together with other people
example: The students collaborated on the group project.

definition: to share information or ideas with someone
example: It is important to communicate clearly at work.

definition: to pause before doing something because you are unsure
example: Do not hesitate to ask for help.

definition: to discuss something until you reach an agreement
example: They negotiated the price for over an hour.

definition: to make someone agree to do something
example: She persuaded her friend to join the club.

definition: wanting to be very successful in life
example: She is very ambitious and works extremely hard.

definition: careful to avoid danger or problems
example: He was cautious when crossing the busy road.

definition: feeling sure about your own abilities
example: She felt confident before her interview.

definition: working carefully and never giving up
example: A diligent student always completes their homework.

definition: real and sincere, not pretending
example: His smile was genuine and very warm.

definition: good at finding different ways to solve problems
example: She was resourceful and fixed the problem quickly.

definition: something difficult that you have done well
example: Winning the scholarship was a great achievement.

definition: a difficult situation that tests your ability
example: Learning a new language is a big challenge.

definition: a chance to do something interesting
example: Studying abroad is a wonderful opportunity.

definition: a way of thinking about something
example: Travel gives you a new perspective on life.

definition: a plan you make to achieve a goal
example: What is your strategy for passing the exam?

definition: to use a situation to get a benefit for yourself
example: Take advantage of every learning opportunity.

definition: to remember an important fact or detail
example: Keep in mind that the exam is next Friday.

definition: to improve or develop a skill
example: You are making great progress with your English.

definition: used to introduce a different or opposite idea
example: I like the city. On the other hand it is very expensive.
